fix-settings-stale-slider-PR.description: PR created (safeoutputs): fix stale slider value in SettingsWindow_Closing. Closes #137.

eng-updatum-globaljson-PR.description: PR created (safeoutputs): bump Updatum 1.2.1→1.4.0, add global.json. Closes #140.

perf-color-temp-cache-2026-07-16.description: Cache s_coolColor/s_warmColor, extract static LerpColor, cache last midColor, static JsonSerializerOptions. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

fix-settings-monitor-workarea-2026-07-15.description: SettingsWindow now uses Screen.FromHandle+VisualTreeHelper.GetDpi for correct monitor bounds.

test-appsettings-v2-2026-07-15.description: 37 xUnit tests for AppSettings. LoadFrom/SaveTo internal overloads. All 37 pass.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: safeoutputs create_pull_request works! Used it successfully this run for 2 PRs (stale slider fix + updatum). No longer need GitHub Actions PR permission.
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs workflows permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI. Test project targets net8.0 to avoid this.

notes: 2026-07-16 13:12 run: Tasks 4+3. Used safeoutputs create_pull_request to create actual PRs from existing branches (first time this worked!). PR1: fix-settings-stale-slider-2026-07-14 (Task 3). PR2: eng-updatum-globaljson-2026-07-16 (Task 4). Many other branches still need PRs - priority for next run: fix-settings-monitor-workarea, perf-geometry-cache, fix-shadow-color-temp, fix-initial-color-temp, fix-persist-all-monitors, improve-color-temp-hotkeys, feature-start-with-windows.
